items.summary: In ClientDetailPage.tsx, fix the 'Create' / 'Save' button so that submitting the new-client form in create mode actually calls createClient with the entered field values and navigates back to '/clients' on success. The button must not be disabled, must have a valid onClick or form onSubmit handler, and must not silently fail. Ensure the mutation is correctly wired to the backend actor via the useQueries hook and that any loading or error states are surfaced to the user.

In JobDetailPage.tsx, verify and fix the 'Create' / 'Save' button in new-job create mode so that it calls createJob with the entered field values and navigates to the job detail page or '/jobs' on success. The mutation must be correctly wired to the backend actor and must not be a no-op.

Audit all form submission handlers (onSubmit / onClick) across ClientDetailPage.tsx and JobDetailPage.tsx to ensure: (1) event.preventDefault() is called where needed to prevent page reloads, (2) the mutation functions returned by useQueries hooks are invoked with the correct argument shapes matching the backend endpoint signatures, and (3) async mutation calls are properly awaited or use onSuccess/onError callbacks so navigation and error handling fire correctly.
